languages.text: "Мы не боимся их, Ваша Светлость. Просто когда они сделают глупость, мы ответим так, как привыкли. Вы уж тогда не забудьте о своих словах о покровительстве".

"We're not afraid of them, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It's just that if they pull something stupid, we'll react the way we've always done. You just be sure to remember your promise of protection when the time comes."
languages.original_text: "Мы не боимся их, Ваша Светлость. Просто когда они сделают глупость, мы ответим так, как привыкли. Вы уж тогда не забудьте о своих словах о покровительстве".

traits.locale_text: "We're not afraid of them, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It's just that if they pull something stupid, we'll react the way we've always done. You just be sure to remember your promise of protection when the time comes."

"We're not afraid of them, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It's just that if they pull something stupid, we'll react the way we've always done. You just be sure to remember your promise of protection when the time comes."
"Well, yes, all our lives depend on your whims. Well, that's life, what can you do?"

"We're not afraid of them, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It's just that if they pull something stupid, we'll react the way we've always done. You just be sure to remember your promise of protection when the time comes."

"We're not afraid of them, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It's just that if they pull something stupid, we'll react the way we've always done. You just be sure to remember your promise of protection when the time comes."

languages.text: 「まあ、そうね、私たちの命はあなたの気まぐれに左右される。まあ、それが人生ね、どうすることもできない」
languages.original_text: "Well, yes, all our lives depend on your whims. Well, that's life, what can you do?"

languages.text: "Onlardan korkmuyoruz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Sadece aptalca bir şey yaparlarsa normalde olduğu gibi karşılık vereceğiz. Siz zamanı geldiğinde o koruma sözünüzü unutmayın."
languages.original_text: "We're not afraid of them, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It's just that if they pull something stupid, we'll react the way we've always done. You just be sure to remember your promise of protection when the time comes."

traits.locale_text: "Onlardan korkmuyoruz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Sadece aptalca bir şey yaparlarsa normalde olduğu gibi karşılık vereceğiz. Siz zamanı geldiğinde o koruma sözünüzü unutmayın."

languages.text: “我们不怕他们，大人。只不过，他们要是敢犯蠢，我们会按老规矩回敬。到时，还请您记得您承诺的庇护。”
languages.original_text: "We're not afraid of them, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It's just that if they pull something stupid, we'll react the way we've always done. You just be sure to remember your promise of protection when the time comes."

traits.locale_text: “我们不怕他们，大人。只不过，他们要是敢犯蠢，我们会按老规矩回敬。到时，还请您记得您承诺的庇护。”

languages.text: "Wir haben keine Angst vor ihnen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Aber wenn sie etwas Dummes tun, werden wir reagieren wie wir es immer getan haben. Denkt Ihr nur an Euer Schutzversprechen, wenn es so weit ist."
languages.original_text: "We're not afraid of them, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It's just that if they pull something stupid, we'll react the way we've always done. You just be sure to remember your promise of protection when the time comes."

traits.locale_text: "Wir haben keine Angst vor ihnen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Aber wenn sie etwas Dummes tun, werden wir reagieren wie wir es immer getan haben. Denkt Ihr nur an Euer Schutzversprechen, wenn es so weit ist."

languages.text: « Ils ne nous font pas peur, Votre Seigneurie. S'ils tentent quoi que ce soit, nous réagirons comme nous l'avons toujours fait. Une fois l'heure venue, n'oubliez pas la promesse que vous nous avez faite. »
languages.original_text: "We're not afraid of them, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It's just that if they pull something stupid, we'll react the way we've always done. You just be sure to remember your promise of protection when the time comes."

traits.locale_text: « Ils ne nous font pas peur, Votre Seigneurie. S'ils tentent quoi que ce soit, nous réagirons comme nous l'avons toujours fait. Une fois l'heure venue, n'oubliez pas la promesse que vous nous avez faite. »

languages.text: «No les tenemos miedo, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Es solo que, si hacen algo estúpido, reaccionaremos como siempre hemos reaccionado. Usted recuerde su promesa de protegernos cuando llegue el momento».
languages.original_text: "We're not afraid of them, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It's just that if they pull something stupid, we'll react the way we've always done. You just be sure to remember your promise of protection when the time comes."

traits.locale_text: «No les tenemos miedo, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Es solo que, si hacen algo estúpido, reaccionaremos como siempre hemos reaccionado. Usted recuerde su promesa de protegernos cuando llegue el momento».
